## oak cluster info

Show detailed information about a specific cluster

```
oak cluster info <cluster-name-or-id> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for info
```

### SEE ALSO

* [oak cluster](../oak_cluster)	 - Show Oakestra cluster information
